div1.entryFree: Cholic, a pain in the bowels: the teeming earth is with a kind of c. pinched, H4A III, 1, 29. pinched with the c. Cor. II, 1, 83. Singular expression: blow, villain, till thy sphered bias cheek outswell the c. of puffed Aquilon, Troil. IV, 5, 9 (partly explained by H4A III, 1, 29--31; cf. Ven. 1046).
